channel.title: Introduction :: Choria Configuration Manager
channel.description: CCM is a small-scale Configuration Management system designed to meet users where they are - enabling experimentation, R&D, and exploration without the overhead of full-system management while still following sound Configuration Management principles. We focus on great UX, immediate feedback, and interactive use with minimal friction. Small and Focused Embraces the popular package-config-service style of Configuration Management. Focused on the needs of a single application or unit of software.

item.title: Hierarchical Data
item.description: Introduce a new take on the well-known hiera tool

item.title: Templates
item.description: Use templates in CCM manifests and CLI

item.title: YAML Manifests
item.description: Write, host and execute YAML manifests

item.title: Agent
item.description: Run manifests automatically on a schedule

item.title: Registration
item.description: Discover services through NATS-based registration of stable resources

item.title: Monitoring
item.description: Integrating deep health knowledge into resources

item.title: Design Documents
item.description: LLM generated design documents for resources
